SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.storage.stalwart

Class StalwartApiClient

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.storage.stalwart.StalwartApiClient
public class StalwartApiClient extends Object
Stalwart HTTP/JMAP client used by Robin direct mailbox delivery.
